prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2021年第55名→2025年第48名→2026年第54名，近年稳定在50名左右，为全国知名 理工强校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（不明巨型生物活动），可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第98位（一般），短视频曝光 量偏低，未见明显报考关注升温信号；无历史投档断档记录；材料科学与工程A、机械工程A-、交通运输工程A-，3个A-/A级学科，材料学科为传统王牌，与该校 理工定位高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与武汉理工大学优势学科（材料、机械、交通运 输、计算机类）高度匹配，热门专业吸引力可能推高报考热度；本省物理类考生2021年14.7万→2025年25.0万，持续增长，2026年估算约25.1万（较2025年略增），竞争压力稳中 有升；省控线物理类本科批2025年426分，较2024年437分略降，卷面难度变化不大；武汉理工大学位于湖北省武汉市，为本省考生首选211之一，本省招生占比 高（物理类计划约占全校物理类总计划的60%以上），地域偏好对省内考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12252、2026年扩招约4%（使位次数字增大）、物 理类考生略增（竞争略加剧）、计算机/电子等热门专业持续高热（吸引更多高分考生）等因素，扩招与专业热度存在对冲，但专业热度及考生规模增长略占上风，预计最低位次 较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约12495名，区间11995–12995名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13647 → 12544 → 12783 → 12158 → 12252. Over the past 5 years, it fluctuated within the range of 12000–13700, with a baseline of about 12252 in 2025. In the last 3 years, it stabilized between 12100–12800. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 1617 in 2021 → 1579 in 2022 → 1569 in 2023 → 1534 in 2024 → 1531 in 2025, showing a gradual annual decrease. The 2026 plan is 1592, an increase of 61 students (+3.98%) compared to 2025, a limited expansion that has a mild impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was 55th in 2021 → 48th in 2025 → 54th in 2026, stabilizing around 50th in recent years, making it a nationally renowned strong university in science and engineering. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity), which may mildly suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with low short video exposure, showing no significant signs of increased application interest. No historical record of admission gaps. Materials Science and Engineering is A, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Transportation Engineering is A-, with 3 A-/A level disciplines. Materials Science is the traditional flagship, highly aligned with the university's science and engineering positioning.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly matching Wuhan University of Technology's advantageous disciplines (Materials, Mechanical, Transportation, Computer Science). The attractiveness of popular majors may increase application enthusiasm. The number of provincial Physics Category examinees was 147,000 in 2021 → 250,000 in 2025, continuously growing. The estimated number for 2026 is about 251,000 (slightly higher than 2025), with competitive pressure steadily rising. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 426 in 2025, slightly lower than 437 in 2024, with little change in exam difficulty. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, and is one of the top choices for provincial examinees among 211 universities. The proportion of provincial enrollment is high (Physics Category plans account for over 60% of the university's total Physics Category plans), and regional preference has a stable attraction for provincial examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 12252, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 4% (which increases the ranking number), a slight increase in Physics Category examinees (slightly intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science/Electronics (attracting more high-scoring examinees), there is a trade-off between expansion and major popularity. However, major popularity and the growth in examinee numbers slightly dominate, so the minimum ranking is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12495, with a range of 11995–12995.

- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Automation (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Robotics Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Materials (Materials Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Logistics Engineering (Smart Logistics Technology and Equipment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11995–12995, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 11995), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 12400), prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical, Mathematics, and Materials. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (12995), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3740 → 3731 → 3758 → 4120 → 3911. 学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 54th on the Soft Science main ranking. It is a nationally renowned strong university in science and engineering. Although the History Category offers few majors, it relies on the overall level of the university, maintaining stable attractiveness. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 98th (average). Materials Science and Engineering is rated A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Transportation Engineering A-, mainly in science and engineering. The History Category majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.) have low correlation with advantageous disciplines, so discipline evaluations have limited pulling effect on History Category major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is in a wait-and-see divergence, Finance/Finance/Economics in wait-and-see divergence, Teacher Training/Education in wait-and-see divergence. The overall popularity of History Category-related majors is stable but divergent. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch was 442 points in 2025, slightly up from 432 points in 2024, indicating little change in the competitive environment. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, and is one of the preferred 211 universities for local candidates. Although the History Category enrollment plan is small (about 300 students), the proportion of provincial enrollment is high, and regional preference has a stable attraction for provincial History Category examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3911, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 1% (slightly decreasing the ranking number), a slight increase in History Category examinees (slightly intensifying competition), and stable popularity of History Category majors, the reduction and candidate growth largely offset each other. However, the 2025 ranking has already rebounded compared to 2024, and it is expected to continue a slight forward trend in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3868, with a range of 3368–4368.
